topic: My gas tank is always full no matter how far I drive
title: My Gas Tank Is Always Full No Matter How Far I Drive | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: My gas tank has read full for two months. I have not bought fuel. I drive forty miles a day.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a vehicle fuel gauge needle resting on full, dim dashboard light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: An old pickup. Two hundred miles to a tank. I commute across the county.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of an old pickup truck parked on a rural driveway at dusk, fields behind, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I always filled up on Fridays.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a gas pump nozzle in a truck fuel tank at a rural station, evening light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: One Friday the needle was already on full. I had driven all week.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a dashboard fuel gauge on full, the ignition key turned, dim morning light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I tapped the gauge. Stuck, I thought.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a finger tapping a fuel gauge on a dashboard, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: It dropped while I drove. By morning, full again.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a fuel gauge needle on full at dawn, dim dashboard glow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I drove until it should have been empty.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of an old pickup on a long empty country road at night, headlights cutting the dark, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Three hundred miles. Still full. The engine never coughed.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a fuel gauge still reading full, high odometer numbers, dim dash light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The truck smells of cold gasoline every dawn. The cap is always loose.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of an open fuel cap door on the side of a truck at dawn, the cap dangling loose, mist in the air, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Last night I watched the driveway. At three the fuel door opened on its own. Nothing was there.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a pickup truck in a dark driveway at night, the small fuel door open, no person nearby, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The odometer keeps climbing overnight while it sits.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a truck odometer reading at dawn, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Wherever it fills up, it brings the smell of wet dirt back with it.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of damp dark soil clinging to a truck tire and undercarriage, dim morning light, vertical 9:16 framing
